pilot.title: Pilot Identification
pilot.description: Identify optimal pilot candidates for modernization
pilot.exportFunctionality: Export functionality for Pilot Identification will be implemented in the future.
pilot.consolidatedDescription: These scores combine rule-based algorithmic analysis with AI-enhanced insights, weighted by AI confidence levels. This provides the most balanced and comprehensive pilot recommendations.
pilot.ruleBasedDescription: These scores are calculated using algorithmic rules based on business drivers, technical feasibility, and application characteristics. This provides objective, consistent scoring across all applications.
pilot.aiEnhancedDescription: These scores leverage Amazon Bedrock (Claude 3.7 Sonnet) to analyze strategic technology alignment, skills-aware feasibility, organizational impact, and learning value. AI provides nuanced insights beyond rule-based calculations.
pilot.adjustSimilarity: Adjust to see applications with different similarity levels
pilot.higherValues: Higher values show fewer, more similar applications
pilot.noSuitableCandidates: The analysis completed but no suitable pilot candidates were identified with the current criteria.

similarities.title: Similarity Analysis
similarities.description: Discover patterns and similarities across applications and components

components.title: Component Similarities
components.description: Analyze similarities at the component level
components.datasetTooLarge: Dataset is too large with unique combinations
components.technologyDataMissing: Technology data might be missing or incomplete
components.startAnalysisForPatterns: Start a component similarity analysis to discover repeated technology patterns.
components.componentPairsRanked: Component pairs ranked by similarity score
components.clickClusterToView: Click on any cluster to view the component pairs in that similarity range. Circle size represents the number of pairs in each cluster.
components.componentsHaveDiverseStacks: Components have very diverse technology stacks
components.noResultsDescription: Start a component similarity analysis to discover repeated technology patterns.
components.componentNamesHaveVariations: Component names have variations that prevent pattern matching
components.lookForOpportunities: Look for opportunities to extract common functionality
components.considerSharedLibraries: Consider shared libraries or common component patterns
components.lookForCommonBase: Look for common base classes or utilities
components.considerStandardizing: Consider standardizing similar patterns across applications
components.mayBenefitDifferentApproaches: May benefit from different architectural approaches
components.focusHigherSimilarity: Focus on other higher-similarity pairs first
components.differentPurposesExpected: Different purposes across applications is expected
components.allComponentsInCluster: All components in this cluster with their technology details
components.clusterEmpty: This cluster appears to be empty.
components.noComponentsInCluster: No components found in this cluster.
components.mediumPriorityRecommendation: Medium Priority: Good potential for shared libraries or common patterns
components.patternAnalysis: Pattern Analysis: Identify common functionality that can be extracted
components.sharedLibraries: Shared Libraries: Consider creating reusable components or utilities
components.lowPriorityRecommendation: Low Priority: Components may serve different purposes
components.validation: Validation: Verify that clustering is appropriate for these components
components.noComponentAnalysisResultsDescription: Start a component similarity analysis to see results here. The analysis uses distributed Step Functions processing to handle large datasets efficiently.
components.sameApplicationRefactor: Same Application: Refactor to eliminate duplication within the application
components.crossApplicationExtract: Cross-Application: Extract into shared library for reuse across applications
components.highPriorityConsolidate: High Priority: Consider consolidating these components
components.reviewDuplicateFunctionality: Review for duplicate functionality and shared technology patterns
components.evaluatePotentialReuse: Evaluate potential for component reuse and standardization
components.veryHighSimilarity: Very High Similarity - Strong consolidation candidate
components.sameApplicationPotential: Components within the same application - potential for refactoring
components.crossApplicationPotential: Components across different applications - potential for shared libraries
components.noFilterMatch: No pairs match your search criteria.
components.thisCouldIndicate: This could indicate that each component has a unique technology stack combination, or there might be issues with the technology data.
components.highPriorityCluster: This cluster shows very high similarity - strong consolidation candidate
components.deepAnalysisCluster: Review components for duplicate functionality and shared patterns
components.architectureReviewCluster: Consider merging components or extracting shared functionality
components.mediumPriorityCluster: Good potential for shared libraries or common patterns
components.patternAnalysisCluster: Identify common functionality that can be extracted
components.sharedLibrariesCluster: Consider creating reusable components or utilities
components.validationCluster: Verify that clustering is appropriate for these components

landing.pleaseSignIn: Please sign in to access that page.
landing.appDescription: Comprehensive dashboard for assessing, planning, and executing application modernization initiatives
landing.keyFeaturesDescription: Structured approach to application modernization through four key phases
landing.dataCollectionDesc: Collect and visualize information about your current state
landing.insightsAnalysisDesc: Analyze data to identify modernization opportunities
landing.acceleratedModernizationDesc: Streamline your modernization journey with structured assessment and planning tools that reduce time-to-market.
landing.dataDrivenDecisionsDesc: Make informed decisions based on comprehensive analysis of your current state and modernization opportunities.
landing.riskMitigationDesc: Identify and address potential risks early in the modernization process with built-in assessment tools.
landing.costOptimizationDesc: Optimize costs through detailed TCO analysis and strategic planning that maximizes ROI.

Use the navigation sidebar to access different sections or select a card below to get started.

resourceUtilization.title: Resource Utilization
resourceUtilization.description: This table shows resource utilization metrics for your applications. Monitor CPU, memory, storage, and network usage to identify optimization opportunities.

infrastructureResources.title: Infrastructure
infrastructureResources.description: This table shows the infrastructure resources used by your applications. Each row represents a server or instance with its specifications and environment details.

techStackComponents.title: Tech Stack
techStackComponents.description: This table shows the technology components used across your applications. Each application can have multiple components, and each component can use different technologies for runtime, database, integration, and storage.

teamAnalysis.title: Team Analysis
teamAnalysis.description: Assign percentage weights to skill categories for each team to understand which categories are most relevant. Each team's total weight allocation should not exceed 100%. Use this analysis to identify team focus areas and skill priorities.
teamAnalysis.exportFunctionality: Export functionality for Team Analysis will be implemented in the future.

testPage.title: Component Testing Playground
testPage.description: Use this page to test and experiment with new components
